features: Feature: Implement Client Inspector Theme Synchronization (Dark/Light mode) from Server Account to local UI
Feature: Add local UI Theme Override dropdown and '-theme' CLI flag to force specific display modes
Fix: Resolve JS syntax error in Inspector UI replay button preventing initialization on Windows
Feature: Implement Client Inspector UI Localization with multi-language support (EN, DE, ES, IT, JA)
Feature: Automatically sync user language preference from Server Account to local Inspector UI
Feature: Expose new Inspector UI configurations directly via CLI flags (e.g. -insecure-skip-verify)
